title: Sophia AI Solutions
summary: This document introduces Sophia AI Solutions, offering two powerful AI products for automotive dealerships: intelligent outbound follow-up for sales and automated inbound service scheduling. It details the operational workflows, integration steps, and benefits of each solution, emphasizing compliance, efficiency, and improved customer satisfaction.
text:
Sophia AI Solutions
Two powerful AI products designed to transform automotive dealership operations: intelligent outbound follow-up for sales and 
automated inbound service scheduling.
Sophia Outbound Follow-Up
Recovering Unengaged Leads for Dealers- Old leads
Sophia intelligently identifies and engages 
leads that haven't received dealer attention, 
turning dormant opportunities into active 
appointments. Our AI-powered system 
ensures no potential customer falls through 
the cracks while maintaining full compliance 
and dealer control.
Built on a foundation of smart data 
integration and proven sales cadences, 
Sophia works seamlessly with your existing 
CRM to recover revenue hiding in your 
database that no one is touching.
8.4K
Leads Processed
1190
Call backs and Live 
answers
165
Appointments Set
Phase 1: Data Collection & Integration
Step 1 4 Define "Unengaged Lead" Criteria
72-Hour Rule
No dealer outbound activity within 72 hours
No Customer Reply
Customer has not responded to previous outreach
Status Verification
Status NOT "working," "appointment," "sold," "bad," or "do-
not-contact"
Compliance Check
Customer is not suppressed (bad number, opt-out, etc.)
Outcome: A universal safety rule for all rooftops ensuring compliant, targeted outreach.
Step 2: Build Tiered Data Ingestion Pipeline
Tier 1 4 CRM API
Strategic Path: Pull activity history, last 
contact dates, statuses, and opt-outs 
directly from CRM systems.
Tier 2 4 Automated Daily 
Export
Fastest Practical Path: Dealer 
schedules auto-export report 
(CSV/XML) containing Lead ID, last 
activity timestamp, customer reply 
timestamp, status, and contact info. We 
ingest daily.
Tier 3 4 Strolid Engagement 
Portal
Fallback: Dealer marks leads as 
engaged/not engaged manually 
through intuitive interface.
Outcome: A reliable method for filtering leads before Sophia calls, ensuring maximum efficiency and dealer satisfaction.
Step 3: Confirm Suppression Logic
Fully Compliant Outbound Calling
Strolid's suppression logic ensures every call meets regulatory 
requirements and respects customer preferences. Our system 
automatically filters contacts based on multiple criteria to 
protect your dealership's reputation.
Outcome: Fully compliant outbound calling that builds trust and 
maintains legal standards.
Opt-Outs
Customers who requested no contact
Bad Numbers
Invalid or disconnected phone numbers
Bought Elsewhere
Customers who purchased from competitors
Not In Market
Customers not currently shopping
Phase 2: Sophia Operational Workflow
Step 4 4 Establish Standard Cadence
Using the proven cadence that works in zBDC, Sophia follows a strategic timeline to maximize engagement without overwhelming 
customers. All interactions are captured in vCon and stored in Strolid for complete visibility.
1Day 3
First Sophia call
2 Day 4
Follow-up attempt
3Day 5
Third contact
4 Day 7
Weekly check-in
5Day 10
Extended follow-up
6 Day 15
Final outreach
Step 5: Set Up Callback Routing
Option 1
Dealer Handles Callbacks: Route interested customers directly 
to your sales team for immediate follow-up.
Option 2
Strolid Handles Callbacks: Premium SKU where our team 
manages callbacks and qualifies leads before transfer.
Outcome: Dealer-specific routing improves adoption and ensures seamless integration with existing sales processes.
Step 6: Set Reporting Expectations
Provide dealers with comprehensive visibility into Sophia 's performance and impact. Our detailed reporting demonstrates clear value 
and ROI while identifying opportunities for optimization.
Calls Placed
Total outbound attempts and 
timing
Voicemails
Messages left and callback rates
Live Answers
Direct customer conversations
Appointments Set
Confirmed showroom visits
Suppression Reasons
Why leads were filtered out
Opt-Outs
Customer preference updates
Recovered Opportunities
Revenue potential unlocked
Outcome: Clear value demonstration that builds confidence and justifies investment.
Sophia Inbound Service Scheduler
AI Answers Your Service Calls and Books Appointments
Transform your service department with AI that answers every call, 
books appointments accurately, and escalates to humans when needed. 
Sophia integrates seamlessly with your existing scheduling systems to 
reduce wait times and improve customer satisfaction.
Built on Strolid's proven DMS integrations with Strolid's intelligent 
conversation handling, this solution ensures no service call goes 
unanswered while maintaining the personal touch customers expect.
100%
Calls answered
24/7
Availability
0
Wait time
Phase 1: Data Collection & Integration
Step 1 4 Identify Service Scheduling Data Needed
Sophia must have access to critical scheduling information to book accurate appointments and provide excellent customer service. 
Integration with Strolid provides the foundation for seamless operation.
Service Scheduler Integrations
Access via Strolid to DMS and scheduling systems
Dealer Operations
Hours, service menus, and RO types
Shop Capacity Rules
Optional but improves scheduling accuracy
Contact History
Optional but enhances customer experience
Outcome: Sophia can book accurate appointments that respect shop capacity and customer preferences.
Step 2: Confirm Strolid Integration Workflows
Strolid Provides
DMS/CRM connections
Scheduling integrations
Existing OEM-compliant workflows
Strolid Adds
Human escape hatch
vCon conversation intelligence
Comprehensive reporting
Outcome: Clear division of responsibilities ensures smooth implementation and optimal performance from both platforms.
Operational Workflow
Step 3 4 Define Call Flow
1
Inbound Call
Customer calls service department
2
AI Answers
Sophia greets and identifies customer
3
Service Action
Books appointment, reschedules, or answers questions
4
Escalation Check
Transfers to human when needed
5
Documentation
Stores vCon and pushes appointment into scheduler
Step 4: Set Human Escape Hatch Rules
What differentiates Strolid from every other AI service scheduler is our intelligent human escalation. Sophia knows when to seamlessly 
transfer calls to ensure customer satisfaction.
Customer Request
Customer asks for a person
Confusion Detected
Customer is confused or frustrated
Beyond Scope
Customer requests something AI cannot answer
Complex Service
Complex service questions arise
Outcome: Differentiates Strolid from every other AI service scheduler by maintaining the human touch when it matters most.
Step 5: Reporting
Comprehensive reporting demonstrates the value of AI service scheduling while identifying opportunities to optimize customer 
experience and operational efficiency.
Calls Answered
Total inbound calls handled by 
Sophia
Booked Appointments
Successfully scheduled service 
visits
Transfers to Humans
Escalations requiring personal 
attention
Customer Sentiment
Satisfaction scores and 
feedback
Drop/Hang-Up 
Reduction
Decreased abandoned calls
